title: Rust lichen-schc: real compress/decompress (rules 0-4, vector tests)
description: Replace codec.rs stubs with real RFC 8724 BitWriter/BitReader and per-rule compress_packet/decompress_packet. Rules 0-4 match Python reference exactly. Tests validate against test/vectors/schc_compression.json data.
close_reason: Implemented in Rust: codec.rs real compress/decompress (rules 0-4, all 5 vectors pass), fragment.rs FragmentSender+Receiver (CRC32 MIC, window/FCN schedule, 9 tests pass)
